description: A/B comparison of x-build discuss --mode interview: old (ad-hoc 4-6 questions) vs new (5-dimension scan + ambiguity gating)

method.goal: Build a REST API with JWT auth for a todo app
method.condition_a: Old — identify 4-6 ambiguous areas, ask clarifying questions
method.simulated_user: Reasonable but not overly detailed answers

new.quality_resolution: vague 'reliably' → specific HTTP codes + integration tests + OpenAPI
new.timeline_resolution: vague 'get it done' → MVP-first phasing + no blocking deps

conclusions: New interview covers 100% of dimensions vs 60% for old
Ambiguity gating catches vague answers that old interview accepts as-is
Drill-down converts 'it should work reliably' into concrete HTTP codes + test strategy
Question overhead is +83% (11 vs 6) but produces +167% more actionable decisions
Quality and timeline are the most commonly under-specified dimensions
